name: Coiled Rope Storage Bin Large Fox - Cloud Island™
description: Your little one's space will be clean and decorated in adorable style with this Large Fox Coiled Rope Storage Bin from cloud island™. Made from soft coiled rope, this animal storage bin with a playful fox face adds sweet flair to their space while keeping the room neat and tidy. This sturdy basket with a round silhouette is great for stowing almost anything — from toys to books to diapers — making storage simple and convenient.
